briefdescription.para: Start index is used by the property registration macro.
Start index of View properties.
Reserving 1000 property indices.
Enumeration for the start and end property ranges for View.
OffScreenRenderingType enumeration.
Key Event signal type.
Focus changed signal type.
ResourceReady signal type.
Offscreen rendering finished signal type.
AccessibilityActivate signal type.
AccessibilityReadingSkipped signal type.
AccessibilityReadingPaused signal type.
AccessibilityReadingResumed signal type.
AccessibilityReadingCancelled signal type.
AccessibilityReadingStopped signal type.
AccessibilityGetName signal type.
AccessibilityGetDescription signal type.
AccessibilityHighlighted signal type.

parameterdescription.para: highlighted true if View is highlighted, false if highlight is removed.

briefdescription.para: Visual Event signal type.
Creates an uninitialized View handle.

detaileddescription.para: Only derived versions can be instantiated. Calling member functions with an uninitialized Dali::Object is not allowed.

briefdescription.para: Copy constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
Creates another handle that points to the same real object.
view
Handle to copy

briefdescription.para: Move constructor.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to move

briefdescription.para: Destructor.

detaileddescription.para: This is non-virtual since derived Handle types must not contain data or virtual methods.

briefdescription.para: Copy assignment operator.

detaileddescription.para:
Changes this handle to point to another real object.
handle
Object to assign this to
Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Move assignment operator.

parameterdescription.para: Object to assign this to

simplesect.para: Reference to this

briefdescription.para: Measures the view with the given constraints.

detaileddescription.para: This method implements caching to avoid redundant calculations. It calls OnMeasure internally (Template Method pattern).

parameterdescription.para: The width constraint for measurement
The height constraint for measurement

simplesect.para: The measured size

briefdescription.para: Arranges the view within the given bounds.

detaileddescription.para: This method calls OnArrange internally (Template Method pattern).

parameterdescription.para: The bounds to arrange the view in

simplesect.para: The final arranged size

briefdescription.para: Invalidates the measure of this view.

detaileddescription.para: This propagates to the parent layout while one exists, until the layout root is reached (no parent Layout).

briefdescription.para: Invalidates the arrange of this view.
Gets the measured size from the last Measure() pass.

simplesect.para: The measured size

briefdescription.para: Sets a custom measure callback for this View.

detaileddescription.para: When set, the callback replaces the default measurement behavior during the layout pass. Pass a default-constructed callback to remove.

parameterdescription.para: The measure callback (ownership transferred)

briefdescription.para: Sets a custom arrange callback for this View.

detaileddescription.para: When set, the callback replaces the default arrangement behavior during the layout pass. Pass a default-constructed callback to remove.

The callback should arrange children in a LEFT_TO_RIGHT frame by calling View::Arrange() on each non-standalone child, which writes the child's POSITION_X / SIZE_WIDTH onto its Actor. The framework then mirrors direct children horizontally when the View's effective layout direction resolves to RIGHT_TO_LEFT, so callbacks must not apply RTL mirroring themselves.

parameterdescription.para: The arrange callback (ownership transferred)

briefdescription.para: Gets the x scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The x scale factor

briefdescription.para: Gets the current x scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The current x scale factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the x scale factor applied to the view.

parameterdescription.para: The X scale factor to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the y scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The y scale factor

briefdescription.para: Gets the current y scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The current y scale factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the UiScale participation policy for this view.

parameterdescription.para: The UiScalePolicy to apply

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the UiScale participation policy of this view.

simplesect.para: The current UiScalePolicy

briefdescription.para: Sets the y scale factor applied to the view.

parameterdescription.para: The Y scale factor to set

briefdescription.para: Sets the y scale factor applied to the view.

parameterdescription.para: The X scale factor to set
The Y scale factor to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the current scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The current scale factor

briefdescription.para: Checks if the view is visible.

simplesect.para: True if the view is visible, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the visibility of the view.

parameterdescription.para: True to make the view visible, false to hide it

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the opacity of the view.

simplesect.para: The opacity value (0.0 to 1.0)

briefdescription.para: Sets the opacity of the view.

parameterdescription.para: The opacity value to set (0.0 to 1.0)

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the actual rendered size of this View after layout.

detaileddescription.para: This is a read-only result of the layout system's Measure/Arrange passes. To set the desired size, use SetRequestedWidth() / SetRequestedHeight().

simplesect.para: The actual size (width, height) as set by the layout system

briefdescription.para: Gets the current rendered size of this View.

simplesect.para: The current rendered size (width, height)

briefdescription.para: Sets the X position requested by the user.

detaileddescription.para: This value is the layout input. The parent's Arrange pass uses it (offset by the parent's left padding and this view's left margin) to compute the final rendered position. The Actor::Property::POSITION_X property is updated only by the next Arrange.
To drive the rendered position without affecting the layout request (e.g. for scrolling or animation that should not feed back into layout), set Actor::Property::POSITION_X via SetProperty directly.

parameterdescription.para: The requested X position

briefdescription.para: Returns the user-requested X position.

detaileddescription.para: Independent of layout passes; returns the last value set via SetRequestedPositionX. To read the current rendered X position (Actor::Property::POSITION_X) instead, use GetPositionX().

simplesect.para: The requested X position

briefdescription.para: Sets the Y position requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: The requested Y position

briefdescription.para: Returns the user-requested Y position.

simplesect.para: The requested Y position

briefdescription.para: Returns the current rendered X position (Actor::Property::POSITION_X).

detaileddescription.para: After a layout pass, this is the requested X plus the parent's left padding plus this view's left margin. Direct property writes (e.g. scroll offset animations) may also modify it.

simplesect.para: The current rendered X position

briefdescription.para: Returns the current rendered Y position (Actor::Property::POSITION_Y).

simplesect.para: The current rendered Y position

briefdescription.para: Returns the current rendered position (Actor::Property::POSITION).

simplesect.para: The current rendered position
GetPositionX, GetPositionY

briefdescription.para: Sets the parent origin of the View.

parameterdescription.para: The parent origin to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the parent origin of the View.

simplesect.para: The parent origin of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the pivot of the View.

parameterdescription.para: The pivot to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the pivot of the View.

simplesect.para: The pivot of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the requested width.

detaileddescription.para: A positive value sets a fixed width. WRAP_CONTENT (-1): sizes to content (default). MATCH_PARENT (-2): fills the parent container.

parameterdescription.para: The requested width

briefdescription.para: Gets the requested width.

simplesect.para: The requested width

briefdescription.para: Sets the requested height.

detaileddescription.para: A positive value sets a fixed height. WRAP_CONTENT (-1): sizes to content (default). MATCH_PARENT (-2): fills the parent container.

parameterdescription.para: The requested height

briefdescription.para: Gets the requested height.

simplesect.para: The requested height

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum width.

parameterdescription.para: The minimum width

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum width.

simplesect.para: The minimum width

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum height.

parameterdescription.para: The minimum height

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum height.

simplesect.para: The minimum height

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum width.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum width

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum width.

simplesect.para: The maximum width

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum height.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum height

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum height.

simplesect.para: The maximum height

briefdescription.para: Sets the view margin.

parameterdescription.para: The margin to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the view margin.

simplesect.para: The view margin

briefdescription.para: Sets the view padding.

parameterdescription.para: The padding to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the view padding.

simplesect.para: The view padding

briefdescription.para: Sets the layout mode of this View.

detaileddescription.para: LayoutMode::DEFAULT (default) lets the parent container's layout system manage this View's size and position normally.

LayoutMode::STANDALONE excludes this View from the parent's accumulation, spacing and index calculations. The View's size is still measured normally (so MATCH_PARENT, WRAP_CONTENT and explicit RequestedWidth/Height all work), but its position is taken from SetPositionX/SetPositionY instead of being decided by the parent layout. This is useful for floating overlays, drag previews, tooltips and absolute positioning inside any LayoutManager.

Standalone children ignore the parent's padding entirely. Their measured size is the parent's full inner size minus the child's own margin, and their final position is SetPositionX/SetPositionY plus the child's own margin in the parent's coordinate space. This keeps size and position consistent: a Standalone child with MATCH_PARENT fills the parent edge to edge regardless of parent padding, and any margin set on the child shifts it inward in both axes.

parameterdescription.para: The layout mode to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the layout mode of this View.

simplesect.para: The layout mode

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the actor should be focusable by keyboard navigation.

simplesect.para: True if it is focusable

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the actor should be focusable by keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: True if it is focusable

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the actor should be focused when touched.

simplesect.para: True if it is focused when touched

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the actor should be focused when touched.

parameterdescription.para: True if it gets focused when touched

briefdescription.para: Sets whether descendant focus is blocked.

detaileddescription.para: When blocked, none of this View's descendants can receive keyboard focus. Focus requests on descendants will be rejected.

parameterdescription.para: True to block descendant focus

briefdescription.para: Gets whether descendant focus is blocked.

simplesect.para: True if descendant focus is blocked

briefdescription.para: Checks whether any ancestor has descendant focus blocked.

detaileddescription.para: Traverses the parent chain on every call to determine if any ancestor has set SetDescendantFocusBlocked to true.

simplesect.para: true if an ancestor blocks descendant focus, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the left focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating left

briefdescription.para: Sets the right focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating right

briefdescription.para: Sets the up focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating up

briefdescription.para: Sets the down focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating down

briefdescription.para: Sets the clockwise focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating clockwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the counter-clockwise focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating counter-clockwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the forward focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating forward

briefdescription.para: Sets the backward focusable View for keyboard navigation.

parameterdescription.para: The View to focus when navigating backward

briefdescription.para: Sets a callback for focus navigation within this view's children.

detaileddescription.para: When set, this callback is invoked by the focus manager to determine the next focusable view. It takes priority over the OnFocusNavigationRequested() virtual method.

parameterdescription.para: The focus navigation callback (move-only, ownership transferred)

briefdescription.para: Gets the background color.

simplesect.para: The background color

briefdescription.para: Sets the background color.

detaileddescription.para: If the UiColor has a color ID, it is resolved from the current theme and a binding is registered so the color is automatically refreshed when the theme changes.
If the UiColor has direct RGBA values, it is applied immediately and any previous ID-based binding for this property is removed.

parameterdescription.para: The UiColor to apply

briefdescription.para: Gets the color.

simplesect.para: The color

briefdescription.para: Sets the color.

parameterdescription.para: The color to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the current color.

simplesect.para: The current color

briefdescription.para: Checks if the view is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if the view is enabled (default), false if disabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the view is enabled.

detaileddescription.para: A disabled view does not receive user interaction. Setting this to false adds the Disabled state and emits StateChangedSignal.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable, false to disable

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner radius of the view.

simplesect.para: The corner radius as Vector4 (topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Sets a uniform corner radius for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The corner radius to apply to all corners

memberdef.argsstring: (float topLeft, float topRight, float bottomRight, float bottomLeft)
memberdef.name: SetCornerRadius

briefdescription.para: Sets individual corner radii for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The radius for the top-left corner
The radius for the top-right corner
The radius for the bottom-right corner
The radius for the bottom-left corner

briefdescription.para: Sets corner radii from a Vector4.

parameterdescription.para: Corner radii as Vector4 (x=topLeft, y=topRight, z=bottomRight, w=bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner radius policy.

simplesect.para: The corner radius policy

briefdescription.para: Sets the corner radius policy.

parameterdescription.para: ABSOLUTE for world-unit values (default), RELATIVE for percentage [0.0, 0.5] of the shorter side

briefdescription.para: Shortcut to set the corner radius policy to RELATIVE.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to SetCornerRadiusPolicy(CornerRadiusPolicy::RELATIVE).

briefdescription.para: Returns true if the corner radius policy is RELATIVE.

simplesect.para: True if the policy is RELATIVE, false if ABSOLUTE

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner squareness of the view.

simplesect.para: The corner squareness as Vector4 (x=topLeft, y=topRight, z=bottomRight, w=bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Sets a uniform corner squareness for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The squareness value to apply to all corners

memberdef.argsstring: (float topLeft, float topRight, float bottomRight, float bottomLeft)
memberdef.name: SetCornerSquareness

briefdescription.para: Sets individual corner squareness values for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The squareness for the top-left corner
The squareness for the top-right corner
The squareness for the bottom-right corner
The squareness for the bottom-left corner

briefdescription.para: Sets corner squareness from a Vector4.

parameterdescription.para: Squareness values as Vector4 (x=topLeft, y=topRight, z=bottomRight, w=bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Gets the borderline width of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline width

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline width of the view.

parameterdescription.para: The borderline width to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the borderline color of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline color

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline color of the view.

detaileddescription.para: If the UiColor has a color ID, it is resolved from the current theme and a binding is registered so the color is automatically refreshed when the theme changes.

parameterdescription.para: The UiColor to apply

briefdescription.para: Gets the borderline offset of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline offset

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline offset of the view.

parameterdescription.para: The borderline offset to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the name of the view.

simplesect.para: The name

briefdescription.para: Sets the name of this view.

parameterdescription.para: The name to set

briefdescription.para: Sets the layout direction of this view explicitly.

detaileddescription.para: Overrides inherited direction from the parent. To revert to inheritance, use ClearLayoutDirection().

parameterdescription.para: The layout direction to set (LEFT_TO_RIGHT or RIGHT_TO_LEFT)

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Clears the explicitly set layout direction.

detaileddescription.para: After calling this, the view inherits its layout direction from the parent.

briefdescription.para: Returns true if this view is inheriting layout direction from its parent.

detaileddescription.para: This is true by default. It becomes false only when SetLayoutDirection() has been called to set an explicit direction, and is restored to true by ClearLayoutDirection().

simplesect.para: True if inheriting, false if an explicit direction has been set

briefdescription.para: Returns the effective layout direction applied to this view.

detaileddescription.para: Always returns the resolved direction (LEFT_TO_RIGHT or RIGHT_TO_LEFT), taking inheritance into account.

simplesect.para: The effective layout direction

briefdescription.para: Returns true if this view and all its View ancestors are enabled.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike IsEnabled(), which only reflects the view's own state, this method walks up the scene hierarchy and returns false if any ancestor View carries ViewState::DISABLED.

simplesect.para: True if neither the view nor any ancestor is disabled

briefdescription.para: Returns true if this view or any of its View ancestors is focused.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike the Focused bit in GetState(), this method walks up the scene hierarchy and returns true if any ancestor View carries ViewState::FOCUSED.

simplesect.para: True if the view itself or at least one ancestor is focused

briefdescription.para: Attaches the interaction trait to this View.

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Attaches the interaction trait to this View and configures it.

parameterdescription.para: Callable with signature void(InteractiveTrait&)

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Attaches the selectable trait to this View.

detaileddescription.para: A View can have at most one selectable trait. If the View already has a SelectableTrait (e.g. from a previous AsSelectable call), the existing trait is reused.

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Attaches the selectable trait to this View and configures it.

detaileddescription.para: A View can have at most one selectable trait. If the View already has a SelectableTrait (e.g. from a previous AsSelectable call), the existing trait is used and the configure callback is invoked with it.

parameterdescription.para: Callable with signature void(SelectableTrait&)

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Assigns this View instance to a target variable. This method is useful for capturing a reference to a View created within a declarative UI tree for later use.
Executes a custom action on this View instance.

detaileddescription.para: Useful for performing additional setup (e.g. signal connections, predefined style application) without breaking the method chain.

parameterdescription.para: A callable (lambda or free function) invoked with a reference to this instance.

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining.

briefdescription.para: Sets layout parameters on this View.

detaileddescription.para: The params handle is stored on the View as-is, and the View's measure cache is invalidated.

parameterdescription.para: The layout parameters to attach to this View

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Adds a list of children to this View in a declarative way. This method allows for a hierarchical UI tree construction by passing a brace-enclosed initializer list of View objects.

parameterdescription.para: The initializer list containing child View handles to be added.

briefdescription.para: Adds a list of visuals to this View in a declarative way. This method allows for append visuals construction by passing a brace-enclosed initializer list of VisualBase objects.

detaileddescription.para: Assert if too many visuals are added, or duplicated VisualBase added. Please use AddVisual() API if you need to control error cases.

parameterdescription.para: The range of visuals to be added.
The initializer list containing VisualBase handles to be added.

briefdescription.para: Sets an attachment from uniquely owned data.

detaileddescription.para: The data ownership is moved into this View. If another attachment already exists for id, it is destroyed and replaced. The stored attachment is destroyed when it is removed, replaced, or when the View implementation is destroyed.

simplesect.para: This typed attachment API stores Dali::UniquePtr<T> with its default deleter. UniquePtr types with custom deleters are not supported by this overload.

Use a stable namespace-scope type for attachment data. Local types and anonymous-namespace types should not be used when the attachment may be retrieved from another translation unit, because they may not have a stable cross-translation-unit type identity.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment
The data whose ownership is transferred to this View

simplesect.para: Reference to this View

briefdescription.para: Removes an attachment.

detaileddescription.para: Removing an attachment destroys the stored UniqueAny and its owned value.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment

simplesect.para: True if an attachment was removed

briefdescription.para: Gets an attachment value.

detaileddescription.para: The returned pointer is owned by this View. The caller must not delete it and must not use it after the attachment is removed, replaced, or the View implementation is destroyed.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment

simplesect.para: Pointer to the stored value, or nullptr if missing or type mismatched

briefdescription.para: Gets a const attachment value.

detaileddescription.para: The returned pointer is owned by this View. The caller must not delete it and must not use it after the attachment is removed, replaced, or the View implementation is destroyed.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment

simplesect.para: Pointer to the stored value, or nullptr if missing or type mismatched

briefdescription.para: Detaches an attachment value.

detaileddescription.para: If the stored value type matches T, the attachment is removed from this View and ownership of the value is transferred to the returned UniquePtr. If the attachment is missing or the type does not match, this View is left unchanged and nullptr is returned.

simplesect.para: This typed attachment API detaches Dali::UniquePtr<T> with its default deleter. UniquePtr types with custom deleters are not supported by this overload.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment

simplesect.para: The detached value, or nullptr if missing or type mismatched

briefdescription.para: Inserts a child at the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The index where to insert
The child to insert

briefdescription.para: Removes all children from this View.
Gets the number of child views.

simplesect.para: The child count

briefdescription.para: Gets the child view at the specified index.

parameterdescription.para: The child index

simplesect.para: The child view at the index

briefdescription.para: Returns the index of the given child view, or -1 if not found.

parameterdescription.para: The child view to find

simplesect.para: Index of the view, or -1 if not a child

briefdescription.para: Raises this view one step above its immediate next sibling in the parent's children list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view one step below its immediate previous sibling in the parent's children list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Raises this view to the top of its sibling list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view to the bottom of its sibling list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Raises this view above the given target sibling.

parameterdescription.para: The target sibling view to raise above.
UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.
The target view is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view below the given target sibling.

parameterdescription.para: The target sibling view to lower below.
UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.
The target view is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the layout parameters of a specific type attached to this View.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the stored handle. Modifying the returned handle directly changes the internal data. Call InvalidateMeasure() afterwards if the layout needs to be recalculated.

parameterdescription.para: The concrete LayoutParams type (e.g. AbsoluteLayoutParams, FlexLayoutParams). T must provide static GetLayoutParamsType() and static DownCast(BaseHandle).

simplesect.para: A valid handle if the params are attached, or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: Gets the current state of this View.

simplesect.para: The current ViewState (may contain multiple combined states)

briefdescription.para: Returns the state changed signal.

detaileddescription.para: Emitted whenever the view's ViewState changes.

simplesect.para: The StateChangedSignal

briefdescription.para: Ensures this View has an interaction trait and returns it.

detaileddescription.para: If no interaction trait is set, an InteractiveTrait is attached and returned. If an InteractiveTrait is already attached, it is returned. If a different interaction trait is set, an assertion may fire and an empty handle is returned.

simplesect.para: InteractiveTrait handle, or an uninitialized handle on error

briefdescription.para: Returns whether this View has an interaction trait attached.

simplesect.para: True if this View has an InteractiveTrait

briefdescription.para: Ensures this View has a selectable trait and returns it.

detaileddescription.para: If no selectable trait is set, a SelectableTrait is attached and returned. If a SelectableTrait is already attached, it is returned. If a different selectable trait type is set, an assertion may fire and an empty handle is returned.

simplesect.para: SelectableTrait handle, or an uninitialized handle on error

briefdescription.para: Returns whether this View has a selectable trait attached.

simplesect.para: True if this View has a SelectableTrait

briefdescription.para: Sets an interaction effect on this view.

detaileddescription.para: The effect is applied when the view becomes interactive (via AsInteractive()). If the view is already interactive, the effect is applied immediately.
The effect is frozen at set time — subsequent modifications to the original handle do not affect this view. Pass Trait{} to remove the current effect.
If this method is called before AsInteractive(), the explicitly set effect takes priority over the UiConfig default.

parameterdescription.para: A Trait implementing InteractionEffectInterface, or Trait{} to remove

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Add a Dali::Ui::VisualBase to the view.

detaileddescription.para: The visual is added to the top of the visuals. If the container cannot add more than maximum count of visuals or the visual is already added, return false and it will be ignored.
If input visual already added to another view, visual will be detached from old view and added to this view.

parameterdescription.para: The visual to add.
The range of visuals to be added.

simplesect.para: True if the visual was added successfully, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Remove a Dali::Ui::VisualBase from the view.

simplesect.para: The VisualBase's SiblingOrder value of all other Dali::Ui::VisualBase who were added at same container with removed visual will be changed automatically.

parameterdescription.para: The visual to remove.

briefdescription.para: Get total number of Dali::Ui::VisualBase which we added using AddVisual().

parameterdescription.para: The range of visuals to get.

simplesect.para: Get the number of visual base.

briefdescription.para: Get a Dali::Ui::VisualBase by sibling order.

parameterdescription.para: The range of visuals to get.
The sibling order to get.

simplesect.para: Get visual base by sibling order. Empty handle if not exist.

briefdescription.para: Clears the background.
Sets RenderEffect to this View.

parameterdescription.para: RenderEffect to add.

simplesect.para: Every effect inherits RenderEffect.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves View's render effect.

simplesect.para: RenderEffect set on this View

briefdescription.para: Clears RenderEffect of this View, if exists.
Query if all resources required by a View are loaded and ready.

detaileddescription.para:
Most resources are only loaded when the View is placed on stage.
true if the resources are loaded and ready, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Checks whether the view is connected to the scene.

simplesect.para: true if the view is on scene, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted after all resources required by a View are loaded and ready.

detaileddescription.para: Most resources are only loaded when the View is placed on stage.

If resources are shared between ImageViews, they are cached. In this case, the ResourceReady signal may be sent before there is an object to connect to. To protect against this, IsResourceReady() can be checked first.
A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(Viewview);

simplesect.para: The signal to connect to
A RelayoutRequest is queued by View before this signal is emitted

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when offscreen rendering is finished.

detaileddescription.para: A callback of the following type may be connected: voidYourCallbackName(Viewview);

simplesect.para: The signal to connect to
The View has been initialized.
This signal is emitted when the offscreen rendering task is completed.
This signal is only emitted when OffScreenRenderingType is set to RENDER_ONCE.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when key event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: boolYourCallbackName(Viewview,KeyEventevent);
 The return value of True, indicates that the event should be consumed. Otherwise the signal will be emitted on the next parent of the actor. 
The signal to connect to 


The View has been initialized.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the view gets or loses focus.
Creates a ViewAnimationBridge for this View.

detaileddescription.para: Returns a lightweight, stack-allocated proxy that applies animations directly to the given Animation for this View.

parameterdescription.para: The Animation to apply to

simplesect.para: A ViewAnimationBridge

briefdescription.para: Sets an attachment internally.

parameterdescription.para: The key to identify the attachment
The attachment whose ownership is transferred to this View

briefdescription.para: Template to allow deriving Views to verify whether the Internal::CustomActor* is actually an implementation of their class.

parameterdescription.para: The implementation class
Pointer to the Internal::CustomActor

briefdescription.para: Creates an initialized View.

simplesect.para: A handle to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: Downcasts a handle to View handle.

detaileddescription.para: If handle points to a View, the downcast produces valid handle. If not, the returned handle is left uninitialized.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to an object

simplesect.para: A handle to a View or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: Creates a new ViewAnimationSpec.

simplesect.para: A new ViewAnimationSpec

briefdescription.para: Template to allow deriving Views to DownCast handles to deriving handle classes.

parameterdescription.para: The handle class
The implementation class
Handle to an object

simplesect.para: Handle to a class T or an uninitialized handle

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a layout params trait by LayoutParamsType.

parameterdescription.para: The layout params type identifier

simplesect.para: The trait as a BaseHandle, or an empty handle if not found

briefdescription.para: View is a base UI component class that extends CustomActor.

detaileddescription.para: View provides basic UI functionality and can be used as a foundation for creating custom UI components. It inherits all the capabilities
View implements the layout system with Measure/Arrange passes.
